texto: There is a LOT of bad news every day. The world seems to be getting more and more crazy. So every time you see some bad news, go do something nice for someone or go create something. Write a poem or a song, draw or paint a picture, do something nice for a stranger, even something as simple as complimenting a stranger's outfit or doling out extra smiles during your day. We have to balance out the evil of the world somehow. As artists we are most well equipped to do so!
explicacao: Orientação direta de Marcy Ferro sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “There is a LOT of bad news every day. The world seems to be getting more and more crazy. So every…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, art, artists, útil em momentos de inspiracao e artists.

frase_original: There is a LOT of bad news every day. The world seems to be getting more and more crazy. So every time you see some bad news, go do something nice for someone or go create something. Write a poem or a song, draw or paint a picture, do something nice for a stranger, even something as simple as complimenting a stranger's outfit or doling out extra smiles during your day. We have to balance out the evil of the world somehow. As artists we are most well equipped to do so!
